title: Add Case Studies / Social Proof Section with Real Metrics
problem: Site mentions Fortune 500 clients but lacks dedicated case studies with concrete outcomes. Social proof badges are text-only placeholders.
approach: Create /case-studies page with 3-4 case studies following Problem → Solution → Results format. Add real client logos. Add testimonial carousel.

title: Implement Blog as Scalable Content System with MDX
problem: Blog has single hardcoded article with future date. Each post requires new page.tsx — doesn't scale. No RSS, tags, reading progress.
approach: Migrate to MDX-based blog with frontmatter. Use next-mdx-remote with content directory. Add dynamic [slug] routing, tag filtering, RSS feed.

title: Add Animations, Micro-Interactions, and Visual Polish
problem: Site is clean but static. Every section loads at once with no motion. For premium consultancy, feels like template.
approach: Add Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations. Add gradient mesh to hero. Replace 'NS' placeholder with real headshot. Add hover microinteractions.

title: SEO Improvements: Structured Data, Dynamic Sitemap, Blog Schema
problem: Sitemap is static XML. No Article schema on blog posts, no FAQ schema, no BreadcrumbList. Calendly script uses raw <script> tag.
approach: Generate sitemap dynamically using Next.js sitemap.ts. Add Article structured data to blog posts. Add FAQPage schema. Replace Calendly with next/script.

title: Add Interactive ROI Calculator
problem: No interactive elements that demonstrate value. Prospects can't estimate their potential ROI or time savings.
approach: Build ROI calculator: inputs (employees, hourly rate, current process hours/week). Output: estimated annual savings, payback period.

title: Implement Lead Capture with Nurture Sequence
problem: Only contact form exists. No lead magnet (ebook, checklist), no email capture, no automated nurture sequence.
approach: Add email capture with lead magnet (AI Implementation Checklist). Integrate with email service. Set up automated nurture sequence.

title: Add Services Deep-Dive Pages
problem: Services listed on homepage but no dedicated pages with detailed descriptions, pricing tiers, deliverables.
approach: Create individual pages for each service: /services/ai-consulting, /services/data-integration, /services/agent-training. Include case study teasers.

title: Add Team Page and About Section
problem: Only founder placeholder 'NS' exists. No team page or company story.
approach: Add team page with roles and photos. Add company story/About page with mission, values, and approach.

title: Implement Pricing Page with Clear Tiers
problem: No dedicated pricing page. Service pricing is unclear.
approach: Create /pricing page with tiered packages (Starter, Growth, Enterprise). Include what's included, timeline, ROI guarantee.

title: Add Webhooks for Contact Form to Enable Multi-Step Journeys
problem: Contact form submits to Resend but no webhook for tracking in analytics or triggering follow-up actions.
approach: Add webhook that fires on form submission. Track in analytics. Trigger automated Slack notification. Enable CRM integration.
